LEGCON.Panel.Title: Legendary & Lair Conductor
LEGCON.Panel.NoContent: No legendary or lair actions in this combat.
LEGCON.Panel.RepeatBlocked: Can't repeat the same lair action two rounds running.
LEGCON.Settings.AutoOpen.Name: Auto-open in combat
LEGCON.Settings.AutoOpen.Hint: Automatically open the conductor panel when a combat containing a legendary or lair creature begins. You can always toggle it from the token controls.
LEGCON.Notifications.ActivityGone: That action no longer exists on the creature.
LEGCON.Notifications.UseFailed: Failed to use the action — see the console for details.
